description: Retrieves membership metadata and attributes for a group membership in an identity store.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the group membership.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the group membership.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

IdentityStoreId.description: The globally unique identifier for the identity store.
IdentityStoreId.markdownDescription:
The globally unique identifier for the identity store.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 36  
Pattern: ^d-[0-9a-f]{10}$|^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$  
Update requires: Replacement

MembershipId.description: The identifier for a GroupMembership in an identity store.
MembershipId.markdownDescription:
The identifier for a GroupMembership in an identity store.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 47  
Pattern: ^([0-9a-f]{10}-|)[A-Fa-f0-9]{8}-[A-Fa-f0-9]{4}-[A-Fa-f0-9]{4}-[A-Fa-f0-9]{4}-[A-Fa-f0-9]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
